---
title: "Allan Almaraz"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: custom
    toc: false
---

```{=html}
<style>
@import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=DM+Sans:ital,opsz,wght@0,9..40,300;0,9..40,400;0,9..40,500;1,9..40,400&display=swap');

*, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }

body {
  font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif !important;
  background: #111 !important;
  color: #f5f5f5;
}

/* Kill all Quarto chrome */
#quarto-header,
#quarto-sidebar,
#quarto-toc-toggle,
#quarto-margin-sidebar,
footer.footer {
  display: none !important;
}

/* Fix navbar — keep it but reset its padding/styling */
.navbar {
  padding-left: 1.4rem !important;
  background: #111 !important;
  border-bottom: none !important;
  box-shadow: none !important;
}
.navbar-brand {
  color: #f5f5f5 !important;
  font-size: 0.95rem !important;
  font-weight: 500 !important;
  font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif !important;
  padding-left: 0 !important;
}
.navbar .navbar-toggler,
.navbar .navbar-nav {
  display: none !important;
}

#quarto-content,
.page-layout-custom,
main.content {
  padding: 0 !important;
  margin: 0 !important;
  max-width: 100% !important;
  gap: 0 !important;
}

/* ── SHELL ──────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.portfolio-shell {
  display: flex;
  min-height: 100vh;
  align-items: stretch;
}

/* ── SIDEBAR ────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.sidebar {
  width: 230px;
  min-width: 230px;
  background: #111;
  border-right: 0.5px solid #1f1f1f;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  padding: 2rem 1.4rem 1.75rem;
  position: sticky;
  top: 0;
  height: 100vh;
  overflow-y: auto;
}

.sidebar-photo {
  width: 100px;
  height: 100px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  object-fit: cover;
  border: 2px solid #2a2a2a;
  margin-bottom: 1.1rem;
  display: block;
}

.sidebar-name {
  font-size: 0.95rem;
  font-weight: 500;
  color: #f5f5f5;
  margin-bottom: 3px;
  line-height: 1.3;
}

.sidebar-credential {
  font-size: 0.7rem;
  color: #60a5fa;
  letter-spacing: 0.2px;
  margin-bottom: 2px;
}

.sidebar-grad {
  font-size: 0.68rem;
  color: #aaaaaa;
  margin-bottom: 2rem;
}

/* Nav */
.sidebar-nav {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 2px;
}

.sidebar-nav a {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 9px;
  padding: 7px 10px;
  border-radius: 6px;
  text-decoration: none !important;
  font-size: 0.8rem;
  color: #aaaaaa;
  transition: color 0.15s, background 0.15s;
}

.sidebar-nav a:hover {
  color: #f5f5f5;
  background: #1a1a1a;
  text-decoration: none !important;
}

.sidebar-nav a.active {
  color: #f5f5f5;
  background: #1e3a5f;
}

.nav-pip {
  width: 3px;
  min-width: 3px;
  height: 14px;
  border-radius: 2px;
  background: transparent;
}

.sidebar-nav a.active .nav-pip {
  background: #60a5fa;
}

/* Divider */
.sidebar-rule {
  border: none;
  border-top: 0.5px solid #1f1f1f;
  margin: 1.6rem 0 1.2rem;
}

.sidebar-section-label {
  font-size: 0.62rem;
  color: #888888;
  letter-spacing: 0.6px;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  margin-bottom: 8px;
}

/* Skill tags */
.skill-tags {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 4px;
  margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
}

.skill-tag {
  font-size: 0.62rem;
  background: #1a1a1a;
  color: #aaaaaa;
  padding: 3px 7px;
  border-radius: 4px;
  border: 0.5px solid #333333;
}

/* Sidebar links */
.sidebar-links {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 7px;
  margin-top: auto;
  padding-top: 1.5rem;
}

.sidebar-links a {
  font-size: 0.7rem;
  text-decoration: none !important;
  transition: color 0.15s;
  color: #aaaaaa;
}

.sidebar-links a:hover { color: #f5f5f5; }
.sidebar-links a.accent { color: #60a5fa; }
.sidebar-links a.accent:hover { color: #93c5fd; }

/* ── MAIN ───────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.main-content {
  flex: 1;
  background: #ffffff;
  padding: 2.75rem 2.75rem 3rem;
  min-height: 100vh;
  color: #111;
}

.eyebrow {
  font-size: 0.62rem;
  font-weight: 500;
  color: #60a5fa;
  letter-spacing: 1.2px;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  margin-bottom: 0.45rem;
}

.headline {
  font-size: 1.95rem;
  font-weight: 500;
  color: #111;
  line-height: 1.2;
  margin-bottom: 0.9rem;
  letter-spacing: -0.3px;
}

.intro {
  font-size: 0.875rem;
  color: #666;
  line-height: 1.4;
  max-width: 560px;
  margin-bottom: 2rem;
}

/* Nav cards */
.nav-cards {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(3, minmax(0, 1fr));
  gap: 10px;
  margin-bottom: 2.5rem;
}

.nav-card {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  padding: 0.65rem 1rem;
  border: 0.5px solid #e8e8e8;
  border-radius: 10px;
  text-decoration: none !important;
  color: inherit;
  background: #fff;
  text-align: center;
  transition: border-color 0.15s, box-shadow 0.15s;
}

.nav-card:hover {
  border-color: #bbb;
  box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.06);
}

.nav-card-title {
  font-size: 0.8rem;
  font-weight: 500;
  color: #111;
  margin: 0;
}

.nav-card-desc {
  display: none;
}

/* Section rules */
.rule-bold {
  border: none;
  border-top: 1.5px solid #111;
  margin: 0 0 1.5rem;
}

.rule-light {
  border: none;
  border-top: 0.5px solid #efefef;
  margin: 0 0 1.5rem;
}

/* Label + body rows — stacked */
.label-row {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 0.5rem;
  margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
}

.label-col {
  width: auto;
  min-width: unset;
  padding-top: 0;
}

.label-text {
  font-size: 0.75rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: #111;
  letter-spacing: 0.8px;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  margin-bottom: 0.4rem;
}

.body-col {
  flex: 1;
  font-size: 0.855rem;
  color: #666;
  line-height: 1.4;
}

/* Resume buttons */
.resume-btns {
  display: flex;
  gap: 8px;
  margin-bottom: 2.5rem;
}

.btn-dark {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  padding: 7px 14px;
  background: #111;
  color: #fff !important;
  font-size: 0.76rem;
  font-weight: 500;
  border-radius: 5px;
  text-decoration: none !important;
  transition: background 0.15s;
}
.btn-dark:hover { background: #333; }

.btn-outline {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  padding: 7px 14px;
  background: #111;
  color: #fff !important;
  font-size: 0.76rem;
  font-weight: 500;
  border-radius: 5px;
  text-decoration: none !important;
  border: 0.5px solid #111;
  transition: background 0.15s;
}
.btn-outline:hover { background: #333; border-color: #333; }

/* Target opportunities table */
.targets-table {
  width: 100%;
  border-collapse: collapse;
  margin-top: 2rem;
  font-size: 0.72rem;
}

.targets-table th {
  font-size: 0.58rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: #60a5fa;
  letter-spacing: 0.8px;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  padding: 0 1rem 0.5rem 0;
  text-align: left;
  vertical-align: bottom;
  border-bottom: 0.5px solid #e8e8e8;
}

.targets-table td {
  padding: 0.35rem 1rem 0.35rem 0;
  color: #666;
  vertical-align: top;
  border-bottom: 0.5px solid #f5f5f5;
  line-height: 1.4;
  font-size: 0.56rem;
}

.targets-table tr:last-child td {
  border-bottom: none;
}
</style>

<div class="portfolio-shell">

  <aside class="sidebar">
    <img
      src="images/Headshot1.jpg"
      alt="Allan Almaraz"
      class="sidebar-photo"
      onerror="this.style.display='none'"
    >
    <div class="sidebar-name">Allan Almaraz</div>
    <div class="sidebar-credential">MSBA · UC Irvine</div>
    <div class="sidebar-grad">Graduating June 2026</div>

    <nav class="sidebar-nav">
      <a href="index.html" class="active">
        <span class="nav-pip"></span>Home
      </a>
      <a href="about.html">
        <span class="nav-pip"></span>About Me
      </a>
      <a href="experience.html">
        <span class="nav-pip"></span>Experience
      </a>
      <a href="projects.html">
        <span class="nav-pip"></span>Projects
      </a>
    </nav>

    <hr class="sidebar-rule">

    <div class="sidebar-section-label">Skills</div>
    <div class="skill-tags">
      <span class="skill-tag">SQL</span>
      <span class="skill-tag">Python</span>
      <span class="skill-tag">Tableau</span>
      <span class="skill-tag">Power BI</span>
      <span class="skill-tag">R</span>
      <span class="skill-tag">Excel</span>
      <span class="skill-tag">Alteryx</span>
    </div>

    <div class="sidebar-links">
      <a href="https://linkedin.com/in/allanalmaraz/" target="_blank" class="accent">LinkedIn ↗</a>
      <a href="files/resume_analytics.pdf" target="_blank">Analytics Resume ↗</a>
      <a href="files/resume_highered.pdf" target="_blank">Higher Ed Resume ↗</a>
    </div>
  </aside>

  <main class="main-content">

    <div class="eyebrow">Welcome</div>
    <div class="headline">Hello, I'm Allan.</div>
    <div class="intro">
      I am a first-generation graduate student pursuing my Master of Science in Business Analytics (MSBA) at the University of California, Irvine (UCI), with a passion for using data to inform decisions and drive meaningful change. This is my professional portfolio, where you can explore who I am, my experience, and the projects I have worked on.
    </div>

    <div class="nav-cards">
      <a class="nav-card" href="about.html">
        <div class="nav-card-title">About Me</div>
      </a>
      <a class="nav-card" href="experience.html">
        <div class="nav-card-title">Experience</div>
      </a>
      <a class="nav-card" href="projects.html">
        <div class="nav-card-title">Projects</div>
      </a>
    </div>

    <hr class="rule-bold">

    <div class="label-row">
      <div class="label-col"><div class="label-text">Mission</div></div>
      <div class="body-col">
        I believe data has the power to move organizations forward. My goal is to work for the kinds of companies that show up in people's everyday lives, the brands they eat at, wear, root for, and learn from. I find purpose in knowing that my analysis could shape how these organizations make decisions, and that the results would be visible in the world around me. Whether supporting a restaurant brand, an apparel company, or a university, I want to be the analyst who turns complex data into decisions that actually change how things are done.
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="resume-btns">
      <a href="files/resume_analytics.pdf" target="_blank" class="btn-dark">Analytics Resume</a>
      <a href="files/resume_highered.pdf" target="_blank" class="btn-outline">Higher Ed Resume</a>
    </div>

    <hr class="rule-bold">

    <div class="label-row">
      <div class="label-col"><div class="label-text">Goals</div></div>
      <div class="body-col">
        Through my MSBA program and professional experience, I have built a growing toolkit centered on data analysis and business strategy. My goal is to bring that toolkit to companies that people interact with every day, where the work of an analyst is connected to something real and tangible. By deepening my expertise in SQL, Python, Tableau, and Power BI, I want to bridge the analytical and strategic sides of a business. With a graduation date of June 2026, I am actively pursuing entry-level analyst roles in financial, marketing, and business analytics across industries like food service, apparel, higher education, and consumer goods.
      </div>
    </div>

    <div>
      <table class="targets-table">
        <thead>
          <tr>
            <th>Roles</th>
            <th>Industries</th>
            <th>Regions</th>
          </tr>
        </thead>
        <tbody>
          <tr>
            <td>Financial Analyst</td>
            <td>Restaurant &amp; Food Service</td>
            <td>Ventura County</td>
          </tr>
          <tr>
            <td>Budget Analyst</td>
            <td>Higher Education</td>
            <td>Santa Barbara County</td>
          </tr>
          <tr>
            <td>Marketing Analyst</td>
            <td>Local Government</td>
            <td>Sacramento County</td>
          </tr>
          <tr>
            <td>Supply Chain Analyst</td>
            <td>Consumer Packaged Goods</td>
            <td>Orange County</td>
          </tr>
          <tr>
            <td>Business Strategy Analyst</td>
            <td>Apparel</td>
            <td></td>
          </tr>
        </tbody>
      </table>
    </div>

  </main>
</div>
```
